name: Nora's Tiramisu
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs into two bowls.
2. Blend the liqueur into the yolks.
3. Blend in the mascarpone cheese.
4. Beat the egg whites until they form soft peaks.
5. Gradually beat in sugar to the egg whites, creating stiff peaks.
6. Blend half of the egg whites with the cheese mixture; fold in the remaining egg whites.
7. Set aside.
8. Dip ladyfingers into espresso and place them in a shallow dish.
9. Add half of the cheese mixture to the dish with ladyfingers.
10. Smooth out the layer, then add the espresso-coated ladyfingers.
11. Top with the remaining cheese mixture.
12. Smooth out the top layer, then cover with the remaining chocolate.
13. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
